problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
